issue_title: Foreman: Harden PIT Stage 11 builder appointment with executable readiness proof
scope_notes: Docs/governance-only Stage 11 readiness-hardening package for PIT. Adds pre-appointment proof templates and blocker controls without appointing a builder, starting Stage 12, clearing Build Authorization, or asserting GREEN/live/FUNCTIONAL_PASS outcomes.
evidence_required: All six Stage 11 readiness-hardening artifacts exist under modules/pit/11-builder-appointment/
Builder readiness proof pack requires concrete evidence tables/plans (not acknowledgement-only)
RED baseline reconciliation remains unresolved blocker with only Option A/Option B decision paths and CS2 sign-off requirement
Stage 8 hardening acknowledgement lists all 8 artifacts by name/path with execution-use and proof fields
Tracker keeps Stage 11 NOT_STARTED, Stage 12 NOT_STARTED, Build Authorization NOT CLEARED
144-vs-147 RED reconciliation blocker remains open unless CS2 records decision
